title: Stock picks of the week: 6 stocks with consistent score improvement and upside potential of up to 29%
summary: At a time when there are so many headwinds for the markets, it is tough to imagine that things can get better. But sentiment is a fickle thing and can change before you know it. And by the time you figure out why, the market would have moved on. So, while there is no doubt that more headwinds await the Indian economy, it is probably time to look beyond – at a few things that are not obvious. Our selected stocks for today depict a strong upward trajectory in their overall average score which is based on five key pillars: Earnings, fundamentals, relative valuation, risk, and price momentum. This implies that there has been a significant improvement in their market outlook in the given time frame

title: Crude oil prices above $100 a barrel: How can it impact your monthly budget?
summary: Higher crude oil prices can impact the monthly budget directly with higher daily commuting costs, costlier vacation flight tickets, higher bills for grocery purchases, and expensive dining out. The indirect impact can come from higher prices of finished goods made using crude oil derivatives.

title: Contra funds explained: How they work, key risks, benefits and top 3 options for investors
summary: A contra fund is a type of equity mutual fund that follows a contrarian investment strategy and is required to invest at least 65% of its assets in stocks. Let's explore in detail what contra funds are, their benefits and risks, the key factors to consider, and the top 3 contra funds.
